MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Gregory J. Lewis, Esq., HASSARD BONNINGTON LLP (415) 288-9800 gjl@hassard.com Attorneys for Defendants H. RICHARD MCDONALD, M.D. and WEST COAST RETINA MEDICAL GROUP, INC.
No other appearances.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed, not ARGUED. The Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WEST COAST RETINA MEDICAL GROUP, INC.'S Motion To Deem Defendants Second Set Of Requests For Admission To Plaintiff Admitted is GRANTED. No oppossition filed.

Counsel for Defendant is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem Andrew Schwartz at schwartz@cmslaw.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Andrew Schwartz; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/JPT)
